description: Most popular way to explore Goa. Scooter 300-400/day, bike 500-800/day.
Kadamba buses connecting major towns. Cheap but crowded. Stop by 9 PM.
Pre-paid taxis for full-day sightseeing. Use GoaMiles app.
Two airports Dabolim and new Mopa. Budget fares 2500-6000.
Best way to get around. Tourist Card 200/day for unlimited rides.
Ride-hailing apps work well. 150-300 for 10km. Surge during rush hours.
Green CNG autos ubiquitous. Negotiate or use Uber Auto.

route: Red Fort to India Gate to Humayun Tomb to Qutub Minar
description: HOHO tourist bus covering 19 stops. Full-day 500 with audio guide.
Primary transport. Hawa Mahal to Amber Fort 200-250.

route: Amber Fort to Hawa Mahal to City Palace to Nahargarh Fort
description: AC sedan 1800-2200 for 8hrs/80km. Drivers double as guides.
Pink Line connects to old city near Hawa Mahal. Clean and uncrowded.
Shatabdi Express 5 hrs 800 CC. Multiple daily trains.
Overnight cruise with meals. Basic 4000, premium 6000-8000.
Comfortable AC and non-AC buses between tourist towns.
Works well in Kochi. Ferry from Ernakulam to Fort Kochi just 6.
3 airports Kochi, Trivandrum, Calicut. Budget fares 3000-7000.
Overnight Volvo buses. Semi-sleeper 1000-1200, sleeper 1500-1800.
Union taxis for Solang 1000-1500, Rohtang 2500-3500.
HRTC local buses every 30-60 min. Cheap but no AC.
Royal Enfield 800-1500/day. Valid license required.

route: Assi Ghat to Dashashwamedh to Manikarnika Ghat
description: Sunrise and sunset boat rides. Shared 100-150, private 250-500.
E-rickshaws 30-50 for short trips. Old city lanes too narrow for cars.
Traditional cycle rickshaws for narrow old city lanes. 20-50.
Vande Bharat 8 hrs 1800, Shiv Ganga Express 12 hrs.

route: Churchgate to Borivali / CST to Thane
description: The lifeline of Mumbai. Western, Central, and Harbour lines.
Ride-hailing works well. 200-400 for 10km. Heavy traffic can double time.
Iconic black-and-yellow metered taxis. 28 base fare plus 17/km.

route: Gateway of India to Elephanta Island
description: Regular ferries from Gateway of India. 1 hour each way. Runs 9 AM - 2 PM.
Primary transport. City Palace to Fateh Sagar 60-80. Negotiate before boarding.

route: City Palace to Lake Pichola to Haldighati
description: AC sedan for full day sightseeing 1500-2000. Book through hotel.

route: City Palace jetty to Jag Mandir
description: 30-min boat ride on Lake Pichola. Sunset rides recommended. 400-800.
Chetak Express from Jaipur 6 hrs. From Delhi 12 hrs overnight.
Shared autos and jeeps between main town and Laxman Jhula area. 20-40.
UPSRTC and private buses from Delhi ISBT. AC Volvo 500-800.
Rafting operators provide pickup from Laxman Jhula to Shivpuri start point.
Most attractions in Laxman Jhula area are walkable. Best way to explore ashrams and cafes.
Gatimaan Express 1.5 hrs 700, Shatabdi 2 hrs 800. Best for day trips.

route: Station to Taj Mahal / Agra Fort
description: Pre-paid autos at station. Taj Mahal to Agra Fort 80-100.

route: Taj Mahal to Agra Fort to Fatehpur Sikri
description: AC sedan for full day 1500-2000. Fatehpur Sikri is 40km so taxi recommended.
Battery-operated rickshaws for eco-friendly short trips near Taj area. 20-50.
